result.thesis: Decomposition improves LLM accuracy on hard reasoning tasks
result.breakthrough: BBH +9pp (84% → 93%) provides decisive hard reasoning validation
result.critical_finding: Task-type routing REQUIRED for production — decomposition helps reasoning but hurts recall/commonsense
production_requirements: Task-type classifier (reasoning vs recall vs commonsense)
Route to decomposition ONLY for hard reasoning <90% baseline
Use cot_lite or direct for recall/commonsense tasks
Baseline detection to avoid overhead on saturated tasks

next_steps: Run 3 more benchmarks (DROP, MATH, HumanEval) to complete O-0008
Consider O-0009: Task-type routing architecture choice
context.notes: Scientifically honest validation: thesis narrower than originally hypothesized but strongly validated within domain (hard reasoning). Regressions discovered, documented, alternatives identified. Clear production path forward with routing requirement.
